summary: MVP (recruiter-only, per ng5) = shared pipeline (jobs, stages, candidates, shared notes) + TalentOS auto-rank on dump + a fairness/defensibility surface (f8, serves g5) + double-contact guard. Primary metric is time-to-shortlist (s1); the ranking (f3) IS the wedge. Client read-only view (f7, serves g4) is now explicitly v1.1 (ng5), out of the MVP backlog. Fairness surface added to MVP per accepted security challenge; it's low-cost (TalentOS provides the audit). Auto-posting/scheduling/analytics stay non-goals.

f1.name: Create job
f1.user_story: As a recruiter I create a job with a title + description so I have a pipeline to work.

f2.name: Dump resumes into a job
f2.user_story: As a recruiter I upload/drag a batch of resumes into a job so they enter the pipeline in one action.

f3.name: Auto-rank on dump (TalentOS)
f3.user_story: As a recruiter, when I dump resumes the system ranks them via TalentOS and shows me an evidence-backed shortlist without manual triage.

f4.name: Pipeline stages (board)
f4.user_story: As a recruiter I move candidates across stages (applied -> screening -> interview -> offer) on a shared board.

f5.name: Shared candidate notes
f5.user_story: As a recruiter I leave notes on a candidate the whole team can see.

f6.name: Double-contact guard
f6.user_story: As a recruiter I get warned when a candidate I'm about to contact is already being worked by a teammate.

f7.name: Client read-only view
f7.user_story: As an agency client I open a link and see where my candidates stand, read-only.

f8.name: Fairness / defensibility surface
f8.user_story: As a recruiter I can see TalentOS's fairness audit for a ranking so I can trust and defend it, with a human override.

mvp.cut_rationale: es1=B ratified: recruiter-only MVP (f1-f6,f8) fits c2; client view f7 is v1.1 (ng5). f8 (fairness) added to MVP per es2=A — low build cost, TalentOS already provides the audit, and it de-risks g2 for a hiring product.

roadmap.f7: v1.1 — first fast-follow (client portal + its external auth boundary)

gaps_to_clarify.text: Resume ingestion path (manual upload vs email ingest) shapes f2's size — assuming manual upload for MVP.
